extDescription.message: Autoscrollen per Mittelklick mit umgekehrter Scrollrichtung auf Webseiten.
extDescription.description: Description shown in Chrome Web Store and extensions page

popupTitle.description: Title at the top of the popup window

reverseVertical.description: Label for the toggle that reverses vertical scroll direction

reverseHorizontal.description: Label for the toggle that reverses horizontal scroll direction

altClickEnabled.description: Label for the toggle that enables Alt+Click as an alternative way to trigger autoscroll
